શુભ વિવાહ

With blessings of Shri Ganesh and our families, we invite you to celebrate a joyful Gujarati wedding filled with mehendi, garba, baraat, sacred pheras, dinner, music, and love.

Mehendi Garba Baraat Pheras Sangeet
RSVP with Joy
પ્રેમ · આશીર્વાદ · ઉત્સવ
hero.designNotes: Deep burnt-crimson and saffron palace aesthetic with rich dark backgrounds (near-black mahogany) layered with animated mandala rings, floating marigold petals, and CSS-only diya flames on flanking side panels. The layout is asymmetrically weighted — giant Rozha One name display type dominates center stage with a glowing gold shimmer animation, flanked by toran-leaf columns and vertical Gujarati text strips. A glass-morphism message panel with an oversized quotation mark, a ceremony tag ribbon, and an animated gold gradient CTA complete the royal treatment. Ganesh invocation in Gujarati script anchors the spiritual intent. Fully responsive: side panels collapse on tablet, names stack vertically on mobile, all decorative density gracefully reduces. Typography mixes Rozha One (names), Cormorant Garamond (body/message), Manrope (labels/UI), Noto Serif Gujarati (Gujarati text), and Playfair Display (ampersand/accent).
